name: grid_features
purpose: Clustering input table plus grid-level provenance-aware dashboard features.

columns.name: cell_id
columns.description: Stable grid cell identifier.

lineage.transformation_summary: The 250m grid was progressively enriched in the notebook with Urban Atlas land use, Urban Atlas height, OpenStreetMap transport points, district rent, EMVS public housing, and district labels.
caveats: The grid dataset is derived rather than a single direct official source.
Some district-level values are inherited by cells through centroid-based assignment.

columns.name: district_name
columns.description: District label assigned to the cell in the notebook pipeline.

name: district_features
purpose: District-level anomaly detection table plus sidebar and pipeline summaries.

columns.name: population_total
columns.description: Latest district population total.

lineage.transformation_summary: District-level population totals are filtered to district rows and the latest reference year.

columns.name: population_density_km2
columns.description: Population density derived from district population and boundary area.
